name: Small edits, large models: How Wikipedia advocacy shapes LLM values
summary: arXiv:2606.24890v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Can a small group of volunteers shape how AI systems discuss animal welfare, just by editing Wikipedia? We show that they can. Wikipedia ap...
description: arXiv:2606.24890v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Can a small group of volunteers shape how AI systems discuss animal welfare, just by editing Wikipedia? We show that they can. Wikipedia appears in nearly every major language model training dataset and is weighted more heavily than web-crawled text. The Pro-Animal Wikipedians (PAW), a group of advocates who add sourced animal welfare co...
author: Jasmine Brazilek, Maria Navas, Alexa Gnauck
